mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friendships (requester_id, receiver_id, group_id, status) VALUES (#{requesterId}, #{receiverId}, #{groupId}, 'PENDING')
mapper.select: SELECT friendship_id, requester_id, receiver_id, group_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM friendships WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND ( (requester_id = #{requesterId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId}) OR (requester_id = #{receiverId} AND receiver_id = #{requesterId}) ) LIMIT 1

SELECT friendship_id, requester_id, receiver_id, group_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM friendships WHERE status = 'ACCEPTED' AND ( (requester_id = #{userA} AND receiver_id = #{userB}) OR (requester_id = #{userB} AND receiver_id = #{userA}) ) LIMIT 1

SELECT f.friendship_id AS friendshipId, CASE WHEN f.requester_id = #{userId} THEN f.receiver_id ELSE f.requester_id END AS friendId, u.nickname, gm2.group_nickname AS groupNickname, gm1.group_id AS groupId, u.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, f.status FROM friendships f JOIN users u ON u.user_id = CASE WHEN f.requester_id = #{userId} THEN f.receiver_id ELSE f.requester_id END JOIN group_members gm1 ON gm1.user_id = #{userId} JOIN group_members gm2 ON gm2.group_id = gm1.group_id AND gm2.user_id = CASE WHEN f.requester_id = #{userId} THEN f.receiver_id ELSE f.requester_id END WHERE f.status = 'ACCEPTED' AND (f.requester_id = #{userId} OR f.receiver_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY f.updated_at DESC

SELECT f.friendship_id AS friendshipId, f.requester_id AS friendId, u.nickname, u.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, f.status FROM friendships f JOIN users u ON u.user_id = f.requester_id WHERE f.status = 'PENDING' AND f.receiver_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC

SELECT u.user_id AS friend_id, u.nickname, u.profile_image_url, u.gender, u.birth_year, ( SELECT MIN(cr.room_id) FROM chat_rooms cr WHERE (cr.user_a_id = #{myUserId} AND cr.user_b_id = u.user_id) OR (cr.user_b_id = #{myUserId} AND cr.user_a_id = u.user_id) ) AS room_id, mf.music_id, mf.track_name, mf.artist_name, al.album_name, al.album_cover_url FROM users u JOIN friendships f ON ( (f.requester_id = #{myUserId} AND f.receiver_id = u.user_id) OR (f.receiver_id = #{myUserId} AND f.requester_id = u.user_id) ) LEFT JOIN user_fav_music ufm ON ufm.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN music_features mf ON mf.music_id = ufm.music_id LEFT JOIN albums al ON al.album_id = mf.album_id WHERE u.user_id = #{friendId} AND f.status = 'ACCEPTED'
